name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖GG detail wallet. Gucci small leather goods break design boundaries, constantly reinterpreting classic pieces in a personal way. This men's wallet combines classic GG Supreme canvas with black GG accessories, creating a refined accessory for modern fashion. Black leather trim, cloud pattern fabric lining with GG details, inside: 8 card slots, 1 bill compartment.
name_cn:
💖Includes full original green box packaging💖GG detail wallet. Gucci small leather goods break design boundaries, constantly reinterpreting classic pieces in a personal way. This men's wallet combines classic GG Supreme canvas with black GG accessories, creating a refined accessory for modern fashion. Black leather trim, cloud pattern fabric lining with GG details, inside: 8 card slots, 1 bill compartment.
Model: 408827.
Closed dimensions: 11(W) x 9cm(H)
Open dimensions: 21(W) x 9cm(H)
Color: Black/embossed G original leather.
Made in Italy
Weight: approx. 0.045kg
